description: Composition Black top made of 100% cotton, having a gathered neckline with ruffles and short puff raglan sleeves FittingRegularWash care Machine or hand wash separatelyDo not bleach or wringUse mild detergent onlyDry in shadeMedium ironLook feminine in this elegant top from jealous 21. The ruffled neckline and puff sleeves make you look all the more dainty, while the cotton fabric will keep you dry and comfortable through all seasons. Team this with jeans or denim shorts and fashionable lifestyle shoes for fun outings with friends this summer. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
